buildCommand: node scripts/generate-seo.mjs && vite build && npx playwright install chromium --with-deps && node scripts/prerender.mjs

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self'
